entries.summary: Finished the repo-local closeout workflow on main by replacing placeholder validation/artifact scripts, aligning generated snapshot schemas, and writing the remaining blocker into tracked handoff state instead of chat-only context.
Executed the feasible RR-002 slice in the macOS workspace by hardening Windows CI and scripted validation instead of claiming real hardware validation that was not run.
Added a headless Windows smoke mode plus package-script validation so CI can exercise the packaged executable itself without pretending tray or capture UX was validated.
Treated the Windows-targeted compile failure as a real RR-002 defect and fixed it in scope instead of deferring it behind the broader runtime-validation risk.
